file_insights.purpose: Main UI state management ViewModel for inventory scanning application

patterns_discovered.name: Hilt Dependency Injection
patterns_discovered.description: Using @HiltViewModel annotation with constructor injection for automatic ViewModel creation and dependency provision
patterns_discovered.evidence: @HiltViewModel class MainViewModel @Inject constructor(private val scannerManager: NewlandScannerManager)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic DI setup, testability, lifecycle-aware dependency management

patterns_discovered.name: StateFlow Exposure Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Exposing mutable internal state as immutable public StateFlow
patterns_discovered.evidence: private val _lastScanResult: MutableStateFlow<ScanResult?> vs public val lastScanResult: StateFlow<ScanResult?>
patterns_discovered.benefit: Encapsulation, unidirectional data flow, thread-safe state updates

patterns_discovered.name: Coroutine-based Event Collection
patterns_discovered.description: Using viewModelScope.launch to automatically manage coroutine lifecycle
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic cancellation on ViewModel destruction, prevents memory leaks

patterns_discovered.name: Comprehensive Documentation
patterns_discovered.description: Extensive KDoc comments with examples and usage patterns
patterns_discovered.benefit: Code clarity, IDE support, reduced onboarding time

patterns_discovered.name: Lifecycle Logging
patterns_discovered.description: Logging at key lifecycle points for debugging
patterns_discovered.evidence: Log.d() in init, observeScanEvents, clearScanResult, onCleared

gotchas_discovered.issue: No Error Handling for Scanner Events
gotchas_discovered.description: The collect block assumes scannerManager.scanEvents never emits errors or exceptions
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unhandled exceptions could crash the app or silently fail

gotchas_discovered.description: Code assumes NewlandScannerManager is properly injectable and functional
gotchas_discovered.impact: If scanner manager fails to initialize, the ViewModel will fail

gotchas_discovered.description: Scan results are lost on configuration changes if not explicitly saved
gotchas_discovered.impact: Users may lose scan context during rotation or process recreation

gotchas_discovered.description: StateFlow only exposes ScanResult or null - no loading or error states
gotchas_discovered.impact: UI cannot distinguish between 'no scan yet' and 'scan failed'

gotchas_discovered.description: No explicit control over scanner startup/shutdown; relies on scanner manager's own lifecycle
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential resource leaks if scanner manager doesn't handle cleanup properly

deliverables_met: Reactive scan result state exposed via StateFlow
quality_indicators: Follows Android Architecture Components best practices

recommendations.recommendation: Add try-catch or flow error handling to observeScanEvents()
recommendations.rationale: Prevent crashes from scanner manager exceptions
recommendations.suggested_approach: Use .catch { } on the flow or wrap in try-catch block

recommendations.rationale: Ensure StateFlow emissions and scanner integration work correctly
recommendations.suggested_approach: Create MainViewModelTest.kt with TestDispatchers and mock scanner manager

recommendations.recommendation: Extend state to include loading and error states
recommendations.rationale: Provide better UX feedback for scan operations
recommendations.suggested_approach: Use sealed class ScanState instead of nullable ScanResult

recommendations.rationale: Allow Activity/Fragment to control scanner lifecycle explicitly
recommendations.suggested_approach: Add fun startScanning() and fun stopScanning() methods

recommendations.recommendation: Add usage example in main Activity/Fragment class
recommendations.rationale: Clarify how MainViewModel integrates with UI layer
recommendations.suggested_approach: Document expected Activity setup and StateFlow collection pattern

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding scan history/queue for multiple rapid scans
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation only keeps last scan result
recommendations.suggested_approach: Add optional Flow<List<ScanResult>> for scan history
